About GuitarRep Studios

"Let your fingers do the thinking."

Most guitarists don't give up because the music is hard. They give up because practice is hard and boring. GuitarRep Studios builds focused, effortless drill tools — one skill at a time, sixty seconds at a stretch.

Why we built this

Practice doesn't have to be hard to be effective.

Most practice tools ask too much. They want you to set up sessions, track progress across dashboards, follow structured courses, and spend twenty minutes before you even pick up the guitar. The result? People don't practice. They watch YouTube instead.

We think the best practice is the kind you actually do. Short, focused, immediate. No configuration. No friction. Just you, your guitar, and a clear target.

Sixty seconds of deliberate repetition does more than twenty minutes of unfocused noodling.

That's the idea behind every Station in GuitarRep Studio. We strip the drill down to its essential form, give you a clean signal to improve on, and get out of the way.

How it works

A dedicated practice space — not a course.

We didn't build a curriculum. We built a studio.

Think of it like a fitness studio — purpose-built stations, each one designed for a specific kind of work. You walk in, warm up on chords, strum to rhythm, run your scale — then you're done. Same time tomorrow. Or maybe today you only have two minutes and you just do one. Or you want to hit every Station in a different order. That's entirely up to you. There's no prescribed path — just the work you want to do.

GuitarRep Studio has four drill Stations — ChordRep, BarreRep, ScaleRep, and StrumRep — each targeting a specific guitar technique. And RhythmRep runs underneath all of it as the tempo trainer, keeping everything in time.

The Stations

Four drills. One tempo trainer. One app.

Every drill Station runs the same core loop: pick your target, start the timer, count your clean reps. Tap to score or let the mic do it. Beat your last session.

ChordRep
Open chord transitions. Clean and fast.
BarreRep
Barre chord pressure and transitions.
ScaleRep
Scale runs. Up and down. Clean.
StrumRep
Strum pattern drilling, rep by rep.

RhythmRep is the tempo trainer that runs across all Stations at the Stage tier. It locks your drill to a BPM (Beats Per Minute) target — so you're not just getting reps, you're getting reps in time.

Access model

Start free. Unlock what you need.

Every Station has a free Open tier — always available, no account required. It's not a trial. It's the real drill, with the core content. We believe you should be able to practice without committing to anything.

Session and Stage tiers unlock more chords, more patterns, scoring, streaks, and RhythmRep BPM integration. One-time purchases, per Station — or unlock everything with the GuitarRep Suite.

TierWhat's included
Open
Free forever		 Core drill playable immediately. 4 chords or patterns per Station. No account. No timer restriction.
Session
Unlock		 More chords, more patterns. Scoring, personal bests, streak tracking. Adjustable timer.
Stage
Unlock		 Full library. RhythmRep BPM (Beats Per Minute) integration across all Stations. Full mic detection. Multi-chord combos.

Ready to start?

The Open tier is free and always will be. No account needed.
